overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow shirt and cowboy hat sitting on a concrete ledge in a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character interacts with a handheld device before putting it away while pedestrians occasionally walk by in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete ledge beneath an urban overpass at night, surrounded by neon-lit buildings. They are focused on a handheld device while the camera slowly orbits around them, showing the metal stairs and glass railings of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with prominent neon billboards

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing with red shoes walks past the seated character
pedestrian in green shirt walks past the seated character

agents.ego_description: sitting and looking around the plaza, watching pedestrians pass by

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and red shoes walking past the ledge
pedestrian in green shirt walking past the ledge

entered.detail: large curved digital display with bright red neon lighting on the hotel building

segments.scene_description: After putting away the device, the character remains seated as the camera continues to orbit, revealing a large curved neon billboard on the nearby building. Two pedestrians walk past the character, and the metal stairs from the previous view are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement around a seated character in a neon-lit urban plaza, shifting focus from their personal interaction to the surrounding city architecture. It begins with the character focused on a handheld device beneath an urban overpass, with the camera slowly circling to reveal nearby metal stairs and glass railings. As the character puts the device away, the camera continues its rotation, causing the stairs to disappear from view while the perspective opens up to the building facade. The scene then expands to reveal a large curved neon billboard dominating the nearby structure as two pedestrians walk past in the background.
